name: Bellagio Hotel and Casino
description: A luxury hotel and casino on the Las Vegas Strip with elegant rooms, a world-class casino, and the famous Bellagio Fountains. Great for high budgets and luxury stays.

name: The Venetian Resort
description: An Italian-themed luxury hotel featuring gondola rides, premium shopping, and an expansive casino. Excellent for couples and luxury seekers.

name: Flamingo Las Vegas
description: A classic, vibrant pink hotel in the center of the Strip. Offers a great pool and affordable stays for those on a tighter budget.

name: MGM Grand
description: One of the largest hotels in the world, featuring a massive casino, multiple pools, and an arena. Good for mid-to-high budgets and entertainment seekers.

name: O by Cirque du Soleil
description: A breathtaking aquatic-themed production taking place inside, above, and on water at the Bellagio. Perfect for theater and art lovers.

name: David Copperfield
description: Legendary illusionist performing mind-bending magic tricks at the MGM Grand. Great for families and magic fans.

name: XS Nightclub
description: An opulent, upscale club at Encore featuring top DJs, indoor-outdoor spaces, and a massive pool. Best for high-energy nightlife.

name: Omnia Nightclub
description: A huge, multi-level club at Caesars Palace with a famous kinetic chandelier. Must-visit for EDM fans and party-goers.

name: Gordon Ramsay Hell's Kitchen
description: Famous restaurant inspired by the TV show, serving signature Beef Wellington and Sticky Toffee Pudding. High-end dining experience.

name: In-N-Out Burger (LINQ Promenade)
description: Iconic fast-food spot offering affordable, fresh burgers and fries right on the Strip.

name: Fremont Street Experience
description: A lively pedestrian mall in Downtown Las Vegas featuring free light shows, zip-lining, and street performers. Great for all budgets.

name: High Roller Observation Wheel
description: A 550-foot tall Ferris wheel offering fantastic panoramic views of the Strip, especially beautiful at night.

name: Bacchanal Buffet
description: The largest and most lavish buffet in Vegas, located at Caesars Palace, featuring hundreds of dishes from around the world.

name: Aria Resort and Casino
description: Modern, sleek, and technologically advanced hotel offering fine dining and an upscale casino environment.

name: The Neon Museum
description: An outdoor museum showcasing vintage, retired neon signs from famous old Vegas casinos. Excellent for photos and history.

name: Absinthe
description: An adults-only, highly interactive comedy and acrobatics show hosted in a tent outside Caesars Palace. Hilarious and raunchy.

name: Eiffel Tower Viewing Deck
description: A half-scale replica of the Eiffel Tower providing romantic, elevated views of the Bellagio fountains and the Strip.

name: Hash House A Go Go
description: Famous for massive, twisted farm-food breakfasts. Huge portions perfect for sharing and recovering from a long night out.

name: Hakkasan Nightclub
description: A sprawling, multi-level club and restaurant at MGM Grand, regularly hosting world-renowned DJs.

name: Circus Circus
description: A budget-friendly hotel featuring an indoor amusement park (Adventuredome) and free circus acts. Very family-oriented.
